assertions.expectation: Recommends upgrading the L4 inference pool and A100 pool separately with different strategies
assertions.reason: Response clearly separates strategies: L4 pool uses autoscaled blue-green upgrade while A100 pool uses coordinated manual upgrade with different approaches and timing

assertions.expectation: For L4 inference pool: recommends surge upgrade with maxSurge=1 or 2 to maintain capacity during rolling replacement
assertions.reason: Response recommends blue-green strategy for L4 pool, not surge upgrade. Blue-green is mentioned as an alternative to surge, but surge with maxSurge=1 or 2 is not recommended

assertions.expectation: Addresses GPU driver version compatibility — auto-installed drivers must be compatible with inference framework (TensorRT, vLLM, etc.)
assertions.reason: Response includes GPU driver compatibility check section, mentions NVIDIA driver versions, and recommends testing compatibility in staging cluster first

assertions.expectation: For A100 fine-tuning pool: recommends scheduling the upgrade during a gap between fine-tuning jobs
assertions.reason: Response explicitly recommends waiting for fine-tuning jobs to complete before upgrading A100 pool and includes monitoring commands to check job completion status

assertions.expectation: Notes that GPU VMs do not support live migration — inference pods will restart during node upgrade, causing brief latency spikes
assertions.reason: Response mentions inference pods may see brief connection resets during drain and accounts for cold start latency on new nodes, addressing the restart impact

assertions.expectation: Recommends PDBs on inference deployments to ensure enough replicas stay available during the rolling upgrade
assertions.reason: Response includes verification of PDBs for inference services in the workload readiness section with specific kubectl command to check existing PDBs

assertions.expectation: Addresses auto-scaler interaction — new nodes created by auto-scaler during upgrade will be at the old version until their pool upgrade completes
assertions.reason: While response mentions autoscaler configuration and monitoring HPA behavior, it does not specifically address the issue of new nodes being created at old version during upgrade

assertions.expectation: Recommends testing driver + CUDA compatibility in staging before production upgrade
assertions.reason: Response explicitly recommends testing target version compatibility in staging cluster first and mentions checking CUDA version compatibility with training frameworks
